popularStory.headline: BIO
popularStory.description:
BIO:  Seigneur de Sabran, Constable of the Counts of Toulouse in Provence

** from http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/PROVENCE.htm#GersendeSabranMAlfonsoIIProvence as of 6/3/2016

ROSTAIN [III] de Sabran …

Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - ROSTAIN [II] de Sabran, son of GUILLAUME [II] de Sabran & his wife Adelais --- (-1172 or after).

zh.lifeSummary: 當Rostain II DE SABRAN於1095年出生在法國奧其坦尼加爾薩布朗時，他的父親Guillaume Ier DE SABRAN40歲，母親Adélaïde D'AMIC30歲。他於1153年與Dame Roscie du Caylar在法國藍多-盧希隆加爾薩布朗結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1181年在法國奧其坦尼加爾武茲斯享年86歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rostain II DE SABRAN于1095年出生在法国奧其坦尼加爾薩布朗时，他的父亲Guillaume Ier DE SABRAN40岁，母亲Adélaïde D'AMIC30岁。他于1153年与Dame Roscie du Caylar在法国藍多-盧希隆加爾薩布朗结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1181年在法国奧其坦尼加爾武茲斯享年86岁。

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: SABRAN
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Eliyahu, Hersh, Hyman, Mayer, Nadav, Zev.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic); Hungarian (Sáfrán); Croatian and Slovenian (Šafran); Czech and Slovak (Šafran and Šafrán): from Middle High German saffrān, German Safran, Hungarian sáfrány, Slavic šafran (standard Slovenian is žafran; see below) ‘saffron’, a bright yellow spice and colorant derived from the stigmas of a crocus, hence a metonymic occupational name for a spicer or a nickname for someone with reddish-yellow hair. The word is ultimately derived from Arabic zaʿfarān. The Jewish name is mainly artificial.
Americanized form of Polish Szafran and Slovenian Žafran: from Polish szafran, Slovenian žafran ‘saffron’, words of the same ultimately Arabic origin as above.

variants.name: Shafran
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Simcha, Avi, Meyer, Shoshana, Tsilya, Uri.  Russian Anatoly, Mikhail, Natalya, Oleg, Semyon, Yuriy.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): mainly artificial name, cognate with Safran , from eastern Yiddish shafran, Polish szafran ‘saffron’.

variants.name: Szafranski
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Andrzej, Bogdan, Halina, Krzysztof, Miroslaw, Stanislaw, Tadeuz, Wieslaw.

Polish (Szafrański): habitational name for someone from either of two places called Szafranki in Masovian and Podlaskie voivodeships, or Szafranów, in Masovian and Podkarpackie voivodeships, all named with szafran ‘saffron’ (see Safran 1). Compare Safranski .

variants.name: Szafran
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Karol.

Polish, Rusyn (from Poland), and Jewish (from Poland): from Polish szafran ‘saffron’, a topographic name for someone who lived where the saffron crocus grew, a metonymic occupational name for a spicer, or possibly a nickname for someone with yellow hair. See also Safran .

variants.name: Saffran
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of   Safran  .

variants.name: Safranek
meanings: Czech (Šafránek): from a diminutive of Czech šafrán ‘saffron’ (see Safran ), applied as nickname for someone with reddish yellow hair.

nameMeanings.name: Rostain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Manx: from a shortened form of Mac Austein, ‘son of Austein’, which might represent an unrecorded Old Norse personal name Authsteinn, from authr ‘wealth’ + steinn ‘stone’ or a Scandinavianized form of Latin Augustinus (see Augustin ), with substitution of Old Norse -steinn.
English and Scottish: variant of   Costin  .
Americanized form of Dutch   Kosten  .

variants.name: Augustin
meanings: From Latin. See Augustine .

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: 1  ♂ ‘Wondrous’ or ‘enlightenment’.
2  ♀ ‘Fine jade’.

en.lifeSummary: When Rostain II DE SABRAN was born in 1095, in Sabran, Gard, Occitanie, France, his father, Guillaume Ier DE SABRAN, was 40 and his mother, Adélaïde D'AMIC, was 30. He married Dame Roscie du Caylar in 1153, in Sabran, Gard, Languedoc-Roussillon, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1181, in Uzès, Gard, Occitanie, France, at the age of 86.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rostain II DE SABRAN est né en 1095, à Sabran, Gard, Occitanie, France, son père, Guillaume Ier DE SABRAN, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Adélaïde D'AMIC, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Dame Roscie du Caylar en 1153, à Sabran, Gard, Languedoc-Roussillon, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1181, à Uzès, Gard, Occitanie, France, à l’âge de 86 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rostain II DE SABRAN 1095 in Sabran, Gard, Occitanie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guillaume Ier DE SABRAN 40 und seine Mutter Adélaïde D'AMIC 30. Er hat 1153 in Sabran, Gard, Languedoc-Roussillon, Frankreich Dame Roscie du Caylar geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1181 im Alter von 86 Jahren in Uzès, Gard, Occitanie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rostain II DE SABRAN è nato il nel 1095 nel Sabran, Gard, Occitanie, Francia, il suo padre, Guillaume Ier DE SABRAN, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Adélaïde D'AMIC, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Dame Roscie du Caylar nel 1153, nel Sabran, Gard, Languedoc-Roussillon, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1181, nel Uzès, Gard, Occitanie, Francia, all'età di 86 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Rostain II DE SABRANが1095年にフランスオクシタニーガードサブランで生まれた時，父Guillaume Ier DE SABRANは40歳，母Adélaïde D'AMICは30歳であった。1153年にフランスラングエドク-ロウシロンガードサブランでDame Roscie du Caylarと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1181年にフランスオクシタニーガードウズeスで86歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Rostain II DE SABRAN(이)가 1095년 프랑스 옥시탠이 가드 사란에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guillaume Ier DE SABRAN(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Adélaïde D'AMIC(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1153년 프랑스 랭도c-루시런 가드 사란에서 Dame Roscie du Caylar(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1181년 프랑스 옥시탠이 가드 즈e스에서 86세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rostain II DE SABRAN nasceu em 1095, em Sabran, Gard, Occitanie, França, seu pai, Guillaume Ier DE SABRAN, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Adélaïde D'AMIC, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Dame Roscie du Caylar em 1153, em Sabran, Gard, Languedoc-Roussillon, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1181, em Uzès, Gard, Occitanie, França, com 86 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rostain II DE SABRAN родился в 1095 г. в местности сабран, гард, окситани, Франция, его отцу по имени Guillaume Ier DE SABRAN было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Adélaïde D'AMIC, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Dame Roscie du Caylar в 1153 г. в местности сабран, гард, лангуедок-руссиллон, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1181 г. в местности узeс, гард, окситани, Франция в возрасте 86 лет.

sm.aux environs de 1142 et 1145: mai le 1142 e o'o I le 1145

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rostain II DE SABRAN nació en 1095, en Sabran, Gard, Occitanie, Francia, su papá, Guillaume Ier DE SABRAN, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Adélaïde D'AMIC, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Dame Roscie du Caylar en 1153, en Sabran, Gard, Languedoc-Roussillon, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1181, en Uzès, Gard, Occitanie, Francia, a la edad de 86 años.
